description: arXiv:2607.04438v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Despite growing automation, turning a paper into a coherent poster, talk video, and blog piece often remains a labor-intensive last mile. Recent systems increasingly generate multiple dissemination formats, but a practical workflow must also keep the outputs editable in native tools and bound into one navigable deliverable for revision a...
